achievements.title: Small Mario Vs Small Bowser
achievements.description: As small Mario, enter the tower in World 1, climb to the top and defeat Bowser Jr without dying.

achievements.description: Clear all exits and use every Cannon at least once.

achievements.title: Back to the Plumber Job
achievements.description: Collect all 240 Star Coins and spend all of them.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A Helping Hand
achievements.description: Finish a level with 11, 22 or 33 as the last digits on the timer to spawn a Red Mushroom House.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Fortune Teller
achievements.description: Guess the Item you get before activating the Block correctly in a Red Mushroom House. [L=Mushroom] [R=Fireflower] [Down=Shell] [Up=Mini-Mushroom]
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: No Time to Die
achievements.description: Finish a level with 44, 55 or 66 as the last digits on the timer to spawn a Green Mushroom House.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Full House
achievements.description: Activate all ?-Blocks in the Green Mushroom House before getting the Bowser Card.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Wohoo! Just What I Needed!
achievements.description: Finish a level with 77, 88 or 99 as the last digits on the timer to spawn an Orange Mushroom House.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ultimate Destroyer
achievements.description: Use a Mega Mushroom and fill the Destruction Bar completely.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: L is Real
achievements.description: Finish a level as Luigi.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Remember the Old Times
achievements.description: Finish a regular level while having the Secret Challenge Mode activated.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Does This Count as Finishing the Level?
achievements.description: Use a Mega Mushroom and destroy a flagpole while finishing the level.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Shinespark Technique
achievements.description: Finish a level while having a Power Star.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The Early Plumber Catches the Mushroom
achievements.description: Get a Mushroom by hitting a Coin Block enough times before it deactivates.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: No Star This Time
achievements.description: Get a reward for collecting eight Red Coins.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A Classic Move
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser by using a Fireflower.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Koopa Fight
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser by using a Blue Shell.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Just a Normal Koopa Troopa
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser by using a Mega Mushroom.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.description: Defeat Mummipokey as mini Mario.

achievements.description: Defeat Monty Tank as mini Mario.

achievements.description: Defeat Lakithunder as mini Mario.

achievements.description: Defeat Dry Bowser as mini Mario.

achievements.description: Enter the Secret Room in W3-A.

achievements.title: Skeeter's Secret
achievements.description: Enter the Secret Room in W8-2.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: My Own Small Oasis
achievements.description: Leave your path through a beachy Level and receive some coins as a reward.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Another Classic
achievements.description: Go above the ceiling of a cave level and get some coins as reward.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Something Squeeze
achievements.description: Finish the moving ceiling section in W1-Castle in a single cycle.

achievements.description: Collect 50 Coins in W2-1 while doing only one Shellslide.

achievements.description: Beat W3-C as Tiny Mario without touching the water, collecting coins or using the checkpoint.

achievements.title: Tropical Clear Condition
achievements.description: Land on the Green Pipe at the end of W4-A without touching grass after the first jump and without using the checkpoint.

achievements.title: Tricky Towers
achievements.description: Collect at least 85 Coins in W5-Tower.

achievements.title: Feel the Rhythm
achievements.description: Collect at least 60 coins in the secret sky area in W6-2.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Platformer-King Since 1985
achievements.description: Reach the backroom in W6-Castle without stepping on a moving platform, using a Tiny Mushroom or using the Checkpoint.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Coin Generator 400
achievements.description: Collect at least 400 coins while riding on Wiggler in W7-3.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Hot Purseuit
achievements.description: Defeat a Moneybag and get a 1-Up for it.

achievements.description: Roll all the way to the finish line in Snowball Slalom.

achievements.description: Get to the end in Snowball Slalom three times in a row.

achievements.description: Launch and catch 11 Spiny Eggs in Lakitu Launch.
